_note: Curated remediation guidance per ScoutSuite finding rule. Validated fail-closed against azure.rules.txt.

storageaccount-account-allowing-clear-te.summary: Require secure transfer (HTTPS) on the storage account.
steps: Set 'Secure transfer required' to Enabled.
Set 'Allow Blob public access' to Disabled and remove public containers.

storageaccount-public-traffic-allowed.js.summary: Restrict network access to the storage account.
steps: Set the firewall to deny by default and allow only required vnets/IPs.

storageaccount-encrypted-not-customer-ma.summary: Use customer-managed keys for storage encryption.
steps: Configure CMK encryption via Key Vault for the storage account.

storageaccount-access-keys-not-rotated.j.summary: Rotate storage account access keys regularly.
steps: Set a key rotation reminder/policy and regenerate keys periodically.

sqldatabase-servers-no-auditing.json.summary: Enable auditing on the SQL server.
steps: Turn on server-level auditing to a Log Analytics workspace or storage.
Set TDE to Enabled on the database.
Delete broad firewall rules and scope to known sources/private endpoints.

sqldatabase-servers-no-ad-admin-configur.summary: Configure an Azure AD administrator for SQL.
steps: Set an Azure AD admin to enable centralized identity.
Turn on advanced threat protection for the SQL server.

network-security-groups-rule-inbound-int.summary: Remove NSG rules allowing inbound from the internet to all.
steps: Scope inbound rules to required ports and source prefixes.

network-security-groups-rule-inbound-ser.summary: Do not expose SQL (1433) to the internet via NSG.
steps: Restrict the MSSQL inbound rule to private sources only.
Enable Network Watcher in each region in use.

virtual-machines-disk-encryption.json.summary: Enable disk encryption on the VM.
steps: Enable Azure Disk Encryption or encryption-at-host.

virtual-machines-managed-disks.json.summary: Use managed disks for the VM.
steps: Migrate unmanaged (page-blob) disks to managed disks.

virtual-machines-os-data-encrypted-cmk.j.summary: Encrypt OS/data disks with customer-managed keys.
steps: Apply a disk encryption set backed by a Key Vault CMK.

keyvault-not-recoverable.json.summary: Enable soft-delete and purge protection on Key Vault.
steps: Turn on soft-delete and purge protection.
Set the firewall to deny by default; allow trusted services/private endpoints.

aad-guest-users.json.summary: Review and minimize Azure AD guest users.
steps: Audit guest accounts and remove or restrict unneeded external access.

aad-users-create-security-groups-disable.summary: Restrict who can create security groups.
steps: Disable end-user security-group creation in AAD group settings.

rbac-custom-subscription-owner-role-not-.summary: Avoid custom roles granting subscription Owner.
steps: Remove '*' actions at subscription scope from custom roles.

securitycenter-standard-tier-not-enabled.summary: Enable Microsoft Defender for Cloud (standard tier).
steps: Enable enhanced security plans for relevant resource types.

securitycenter-auto-provisioning-off.jso.summary: Enable auto-provisioning of the monitoring agent.
steps: Turn on auto-provisioning in Defender for Cloud settings.

logging-monitoring-log-alert-not-exist-n.summary: Create an activity-log alert for NSG changes.
steps: Add a log alert rule covering network security group create/update/delete.
Set 'Enforce SSL connection' to Enabled.
Set 'Enforce SSL connection' to Enabled.
